_comment: Crowdsourced hardware-capability database. One entry per firmware revision of a pad, keyed by VID:PID. Submit yours via the Hardware Report issue template (paste `freemicro detect --json`). Fields marked null are UNVERIFIED and awaiting a physical probe (Milestone 0).

devices.name: OpenAI Codex Micro (Work Louder Creator Micro 2)
devices.notes: UNVERIFIED. The entire LED path hinges on these answers (SPEC §4). Launch coverage conflicts: some report VIA-capable real-time remap; Work Louder is quoted saying CM2 uses proprietary Input, not QMK/VIA. Run `freemicro detect --json` on the physical unit and open a Hardware Report.
